a.xlink:title: Sets input and output meshes carrying data to be mapped.
Computes the projections and interpolation relations.
Uses projection and interpolation relations to map data values.
Returns the constraint (consistent/conservative) of the mapping.
Generates the InterpolationElements for directly projecting a Vertex on another Vertex.
Returns the pointer to boost::geometry::rtree for the given mesh vertices.
Returns how many values have been accumulated.
